LightningComponentBundle.description: This component enables Members to review and edit their payment options

property.name: displayPageHeader
property.label: Display Page Header?
property.description: Toggles the Payment Page Header (H2) on/off)

property.name: displayPageSubheader
property.label: Display Page Subheader?
property.description: Toggles the Payment Page Subheader (H3) on/off)

property.name: displayPageIngress
property.label: Display Payment Page Ingress?
property.description: Toggles the Payment Page Ingress (p) on/off)
